description: Brand contract for the Olympus MV single-step configurable starter-template family.

family_inventory.theme_insertion_point: Load brand-theme.css from frontmatter styles after css/next-core.css on checkout, upsell, downsell, and receipt pages.
family_inventory.pricing_presentation: Configurable MV slots use SDK bundle displays for compare/current, unit-plus-total, savings, and full-price modes.
family_inventory.bundle_picker: Single-page MV configurable selector with variant_slots and data-next-bundle-slots-for controls.
family_inventory.order_bump: Optional bump variants are valid only when prepurchase packages exist and must not sync line total unless specified.
family_inventory.upsell_downsell: MV and bundle upsell includes use upsell_offer, upsell_mv_tiers, or upsell_bundle_tiers with visible price rows.

exit_pop.behavior: Available include only; strip unless CampaignSpec checkout exit_intent or promo_code_input maps an offer/code.
